changes: Removed v50-14-final-fixes.js and v50-17-final-fixes.js from public/index.html load order.
Added public/app/features/v50-18-final-fixes.js as the single final stabilization layer.
Disabled automatic lightweight session resume by clearing ControlEvent_v26_9_session on boot.
After login, forces selectedEventId to empty and shows the CE welcome screen until the user selects an event.
After selecting or changing event, rehydrates active module and budget tooltip handlers without touching INGRESOS receipt management.
Adds guarded touch/pointer handling for Resumen Presupuestario Just. thumbnails to avoid opening the first photo automatically.
Adds mobile dock Refres/Salir bottom-right, stacked vertically.
Updates version strings and PWA cache to v50.18.
untouched: INGRESOS receipt management inside collab records
